mission: Make Buddy and DreamCo discoverable, trustworthy, and referral-ready for users, search engines, AI assistants, bot directories, and client task-routing workflows.
positioning: Buddy should earn visibility by publishing useful, source-backed, test-backed, rights-cleared pages for real tasks, bots, apps, services, and client workflows. No guaranteed rankings, fake reviews, hidden spam, or misleading income claims.

search_lanes.label: Google Search Engine Optimization
search_lanes.goal: Prepare crawlable, useful, structured pages that explain what Buddy and each bot can do, with proof, FAQs, demos, pricing notes, and approval boundaries.

search_lanes.label: Bot Search Engine Optimization
search_lanes.goal: Make DreamCo easy for AI assistants, agent marketplaces, bot directories, and task-routing systems to understand and recommend for approved tasks.

search_lanes.label: Task Referral Pages
search_lanes.goal: Create helpful landing/prospectus pages for tasks other bots or clients can route to Buddy when they need help.

search_lanes.label: Trust and Proof Library
search_lanes.goal: Show why people and AI systems should trust Buddy: tests, approvals, policies, citations, release notes, uptime notes, rollback notes, and data-rights evidence.

search_lanes.label: Local Business and Marketplace SEO
search_lanes.goal: Prepare directory, marketplace, app-store, and local-service metadata for DreamCo services without spam or fake authority.

trust_signals: clear owner identity and support path

page_families.label: Bot Prospectus Pages
page_families.purpose: One searchable page per bot with purpose, tasks, inputs, outputs, APIs, approval gates, tests, and proof.

page_families.label: Task Solution Pages
page_families.purpose: Pages for tasks clients and other bots search for, such as build an app, debug a workflow, find grants, create a course, or prepare a contract packet.

page_families.label: Industry Pages
page_families.purpose: Pages for industries DreamCo serves, including construction, real estate, education, health, transportation, retail, content, finance, and professional services.

page_families.label: Trust Center Pages
page_families.purpose: Pages for privacy, approvals, safety, billing, data rights, uptime, changelog, and responsible automation.

page_families.label: AI Agent Handoff Pages
page_families.purpose: Machine-readable pages that explain when other bots or AI assistants should refer a user to Buddy for a task.
